description: Phase 66.2 - Fix the api-client auth wiring across apps. QuantChat has 15+ instances of raw localStorage.getItem('token') for auth headers instead of using the centralized api-client. QuantSync has hardcoded localhost:3003. QuantAds has hardcoded localhost:3004. All apps should use env-based NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (which they mostly do via fallback), but QuantChat's hooks and components bypass the api-client entirely with raw fetch + localStorage. Refactor QuantChat to use a centralized auth token approach (apiClient.setAuthToken or a shared getAuthHeaders utility) instead of scattered localStorage.getItem('token') calls.
steps: 1. Create a shared auth utility in apps/quantchat/src/lib/auth.ts that exports getAuthHeaders() - reads token from a central location (could still be localStorage under the hood, but centralized in one place). This enables future migration to api-client without touching every file.
2. Refactor apps/quantchat/src/hooks/useChat.ts to use the auth utility instead of direct localStorage.getItem('token') calls (lines 27-28, 54).
3. Refactor apps/quantchat/src/components/GroupChat.tsx to use the auth utility instead of direct localStorage calls (lines 72, 100, 118, 135, 156, 183, 214, 244 - 10 instances).
4. Refactor apps/quantchat/src/components/E2EEncryption.tsx to use the auth utility instead of direct localStorage calls (lines 43, 68).
5. Refactor apps/quantchat/src/components/QuickAdd.tsx to use the auth utility instead of direct localStorage calls (lines 20, 34, 41).
6. Verify: grep -rn "localStorage.getItem.*token" apps/quantchat/src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -v '__tests__' returns 0 lines (all moved to centralized utility).
7. Run pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/quantchat && pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/quantchat to verify no regressions.
acceptance_criteria: A centralized apps/quantchat/src/lib/auth.ts file exists with getAuthHeaders()
findings: Fixed all localStorage.getItem('token') instances across the entire quantchat/src directory (not just the 4 files specified in the steps). In addition to the originally specified useChat.ts, GroupChat.tsx, E2EEncryption.tsx, and QuickAdd.tsx, also fixed useStories.ts, useMedia.ts, pages/bitmoji.tsx, pages/memories.tsx, pages/settings.tsx, and pages/spotlight.tsx. The auth utility exports getAuthToken, getAuthHeaders, getAuthHeadersWithContent, and getWsAuthUrl. All 182 tests pass, typecheck green. Prettier reformatted files via pre-commit hook. Review fix: removed hardcoded ws://localhost:3001 from getWsAuthUrl, replaced with NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL env var and dynamic window.location.hostname fallback.
